Fig. 5. Time varying trajectories of error dynamics for each agent

Fig. 9. Time varying trajectories of error dynamics for each agent. Line a) shows the tracking errors of the control protocol with network transformation. And Line b) is the associated trajectories of four agents. Line c) shows the error dynamics of control protocol without network transformation.
